messages.content:
paraphrease: Dear Abdeali,
Hope this email finds you well,

First and foremost, allow me to introduce myself. I am <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>, your dedicated Customer Success Manager at AlManhal; it would be an absolute pleasure to collaborate with you.

I am delighted to provide you with an overview of what AlManhal entails:

AlManhal stands as the premier Arabic electronic information provider, offering full-text searchable databases of scholarly and scientific publications from the Arab and Islamic world. Our platform brings together deep publishing and library expertise with cutting-edge technology, enabling seamless access to thousands of e-Books, e-Journals, e-Theses, reports, and conference proceedings from the leading publishers and research institutes in the Arab and Islamic worlds. Additionally, we house over 1.6 million Open Access Titles.

We are committed to your success, and we would be pleased to offer you virtual training sessions in Arabic and English that empower you to extract maximum value from AlManhal at anytime.

All the best,

Dear Abdeali,
I hope you are doing well.

Firstly, I would like to introduce myself as AbdelGhafoor AlSayyed, your dedicated Customer Success Manager at AlManhal. It would be a great pleasure to work with you.

I am excited to provide you with information about AlManhal:

AlManhal is the leading provider of Arabic electronic information. We offer searchable databases of scholarly and scientific publications from the Arab and Islamic world. Our platform combines extensive publishing and library expertise with advanced technology, allowing easy access to a wide range of e-Books, e-Journals, e-Theses, reports, and conference proceedings from top publishers and research institutes in the Arab and Islamic worlds. We also have over 1.6 million Open Access Titles available.

Our priority is your success, and we are happy to offer virtual training sessions in both Arabic and English. These sessions will enable you to make the most of AlManhal at any time.

Best regards,

paraphrase : We already discussed the price with Mr. Bufares, the price was increased 10%  due to the fact that we've added a ton of new content , and we had a  call with Mr. bufares and we got the approval to keep the price with no increase to support House of Wisdom

The price has already been negotiated with Mr. Bufares, and it has been increased by 10% due to the addition of a significant amount of new content. We had a conversation with Mr. Bufares and received approval to maintain the current price without any further increase in order to support House of Wisdom.

paraphrase: Actually the price has already been negotiated with Mr. Boufarss, it has been increased by 10% due to the addition of a significant amount of new content. We had a conversation with Mr. Boufarss and got the approval to maintain the current price without any further increase for this year in order to support the House of Wisdom.

The price has already been discussed and agreed upon with Mr. Boufarss. It has been raised by 10% because of the inclusion of a considerable amount of new content. Following a discussion with Mr. Boufarss, we have received approval to keep the current price unchanged for the year to support the House of Wisdom.
They asked to rebranding DKN and provide us with all details, so may I know if we can make these changes asap? paraphrease
They have requested a rebranding of DKN and asked for all the necessary details. Can you please let me know if we are able to make these changes as soon as possible?
I wanted to inform you that the Library Portal re-branding has  been completed paraphrase
I would like to inform you that the rebranding of the Library Portal has been successfully finished.
Looking forward to setup a training session for the students and faculty members on both AlManhal and e-Library  paraphrase
I am excited to schedule a training session for both students and faculty members to provide them with guidance on utilizing both AlManhal and e-Library.
re
I am eagerly anticipating the opportunity to arrange a training session for the students and faculty members to educate them on how to effectively use both AlManhal and e-Library.
re
I am looking forward to organizing a training session for students and faculty members to teach them how to navigate and utilize both AlManhal and e-Library effectively.

I need to send this by email to the customer as a description on this project: In 2017 The Roads and Transport Authority (RTA) announced the launch of ‘Read with RTA’ app to match the national agenda of reading endorsed by the UAE for the next ten years. The Agenda considers reading as an integral part of the business of government bodies such as ministries and public entities.
Read with the RTA app enables community members, especially public transport commuters as well as visitors of Customer Happiness Centers, to download up to 150 books in Arabic or English offered in the app free of charge, The app is available for use in Android and iOS devices. Customers and beneficiaries can download the app or take shots of the QR Code displayed in stickers at metro & tram stations, buses & taxis as well as marine transit & abra stations. The user can scan the QR Code to activate the display of the selected book for a certain period

Dear Customer,

I am writing to provide you with a detailed description of the 'Read with RTA' app project. In 2017, the Roads and Transport Authority (RTA) launched this app in line with the UAE's national agenda for promoting reading over the next decade. The agenda recognizes reading as a crucial aspect of government bodies, including ministries and public entities.

The 'Read with RTA' app is designed to cater to community members, particularly public transport commuters and visitors of Customer Happiness Centers. It allows users to download up to 150 books in Arabic or English, free of charge. The app is compatible with both Android and iOS devices. To access the app, customers and beneficiaries can either download it directly or use the QR Code feature. QR Code stickers are placed at various locations such as metro and tram stations, buses and taxis, as well as marine transit and abra stations. By scanning the QR Code, users can activate and view their selected books for a specified period.

We believe that the 'Read with RTA' app will significantly contribute to promoting a reading culture and offering easy access to a wide range of books to the community. Should you have any further questions or require additional information, please feel free to contact me.

Best regards,
I need it in the past: We believe that the ‘Read with RTA’ app will significantly contribute to promoting a reading culture and offering easy access to a wide range of books to the community.

Dear Customer,

I am writing to provide you with a detailed description of the 'Read with RTA' app project. In 2017, the Roads and Transport Authority (RTA) launched this app in alignment with the UAE's national agenda for promoting reading over the next decade. The agenda recognized reading as an integral part of the business of government bodies, including ministries and public entities.

The 'Read with RTA' app aimed to enable community members, especially public transport commuters and visitors of Customer Happiness Centers, to download up to 150 books in Arabic or English, free of charge. The app was available for use on both Android and iOS devices. To access the app, customers and beneficiaries could either download it directly or utilize the QR Code feature. QR Code stickers were placed at various locations such as metro and tram stations, buses and taxis, as well as marine transit and abra stations. By scanning the QR Code, users could activate and view the selected book for a certain period.

We believed that the 'Read with RTA' app would significantly contribute to promoting a reading culture and offering easy access to a wide range of books to the community.

Should you have any further questions or require additional information, please feel free to contact me.

Best regards,

The number of titles read in the past year totaled 340.
